title: 永劫続く追撃【エンドレスマイターン】

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I'm walking around the academy after
class has let out.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Oh my... Yet another victory. You're good at this,
Sei.

text_block_list.name: Defeated Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Ugh! I can't believe this! I wanted to be the one to
break your winning streak...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hahaha. Who's next?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hello, Trainer. It's a card game we're playing.
Sei is unbeatable.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I've been mesmerized watching her blend mind
games with her sound tactics.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Want to try for yourself? There's time to kill
before dinner anyway.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I get destroyed...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hehehe! Rematch? I'm always up for more.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: In that case, let me offer my support.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
While observing Sei's winning streak, I've learned
a thing or two about her tendencies.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
And from my experience in other games, I find
that the presence of a supporter can often be the
key to achieving victory.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Two on one? Sounds fun to me. Maybe that way
you'll actually give me a challenge.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Then let's have a fair contest.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Try applying pressure with this card, Trainer.
Depending on her reaction, we can infer—

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Sure, sure. I already saw that coming. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unlike my first try, we put up a decent fight but
come up just short in the end.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Whew... You had me sweating for a second there.
Not bad, guys, not bad.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, time's been killed, so I'm headed for
din—

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: One more round, please.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
There's enough time for one more before dinner,
yes?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Come, let's start the next match at once. You'll
need to focus if you don't want to lose.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
What luck, a good hand. Let's take full advantage
of it and strike fear into her heart.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: You're playing that card now? Seriously?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Yes. After all, you can't attack right now, can
you?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Ahhh?!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
She's defenseless. Trigger a trap with that tactics
card to keep her in place. Then, we launch an
all-out assault.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
All right, Trainer. Keep the cards coming. No
hesitations.
choice_data_list: You're the best supporter I could ask for.
You're the best supporter I could ask for.

A-are you sure you're a supporter? Not a
front-line warrior?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
All right, Trainer. Keep the cards coming. No
hesitations.
choice_data_list: You're the best supporter I could ask for.
You're the best supporter I could ask for.

A-are you sure you're a supporter? Not a
front-line warrior?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I'm honored to hear you say so. I'll continue with
my support, then.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Our storybook ending is nigh. ♪

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Ahaha... I should've let sleeping dogs lie...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We put our heads together and, after a
hard-fought battle, come away with a win!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Of course I'm a supporter, silly. Think of me as
your tactician.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Now, the enemy is out of options. If we play our
cards right, we can stay on the offensive all the
way to victory.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Guh!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Keep up the pressure. Pedal to the metal, go
go! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We ramp up the attack to eleven, securing a
hard-fought victory!
